query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "videokr: towards knowledge- and reasoning-intensive video understandin" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (reasoning capabilities in LLMs) and dependent variable (reasoning performance) that the user's question targets, even though it focuses on alignment fine-tuning rather than the specific "VideoKR" video domain. It provides canonical prior work on improving LLM reasoning, which is essential context for any follow-up research extending reasoning-intensive tasks.
